steps.t: King Thorin Stonehelm has tasked you with going to Nabgûn-mazaru, the home of Stáli the Hewer, south-west of the entrance to the Dwelling-halls of Ere…
Stáli the Hewer, a Longbeard artist and sculptor of some renown, lives at Nabgûn-mazaru, south-west of the entrance to the Dwelling-halls of Erebor.
Stáli the Hewer has been restoring a mosaic depicting the death of Mótsog and the end of the Greymaul Rebellion, and he has invited you to admire it. …
Stáli the Hewer, a Longbeard artist and sculptor of some renown, lives south-west of the entrance to the Dwelling-halls of Erebor.
